Apple___Apple_scab.cause: Fungus Venturia inaequalis spreads through rain, wind, and infected leaves
Apple___Apple_scab.prevention: Apply fungicides (captan, mancozeb), prune for air circulation, remove fallen leaves, use resistant varieties, maintain soil pH 6.0-6.5

Apple___Black_rot.cause: Fungus Botryosphaeria obtusa in warm, wet conditions affecting wood and fruit
Apple___Black_rot.prevention: Fungicides (captan), prune infected branches, improve air circulation, apply copper-based fungicides in spring, balanced NPK fertilization

Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.cause: Fungus Gymnosporangium juniperi-virginianae alternates between cedar and apple
Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.prevention: Remove cedar hosts, fungicides (triazoles), resistant apple varieties, prune for sunlight, spring foliar NPK spray

Cherry___Powdery_mildew.cause: Fungus Podosphaera clandestine spreads in humid conditions
Cherry___Powdery_mildew.prevention: Fungicides (sulfur, potassium bicarbonate), improve air flow, avoid overhead watering, soil potassium supplementation

Corn___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray_leaf_sp.cause: Fungus Cercospora zeae-maydis in warm, humid weather
Corn___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray_leaf_sp.prevention: Fungicides (azoxystrobin), resistant hybrids, crop rotation, balanced NPK, remove crop residue

Corn___Common_rust.cause: Fungus Puccinia sorghi spores spread by wind
Corn___Common_rust.prevention: Resistant hybrids, fungicides (triazoles), timely planting, crop rotation, foliar nitrogen + potassium

Corn___Northern_Leaf_Blight.cause: Fungus Setosphaeria turcica in moderate temperatures
Corn___Northern_Leaf_Blight.prevention: Resistant varieties, fungicides (propiconazole), wider row spacing, crop rotation, balanced soil NPK

Grape___Black_rot.cause: Fungus Guignardia bidwellii in warm wet weather
Grape___Black_rot.prevention: Fungicides (mancozeb), remove mummies, canopy management, potassium-rich soil amendments

Potato___Early_blight.cause: Fungus Alternaria solani spreads via rain splash and infected debris
Potato___Early_blight.prevention: Fungicides (chlorothalonil), crop rotation 3+ years, remove volunteers, mulch, balanced NPK (more potassium), drip irrigation

Potato___Late_blight.cause: Water mold Phytophthora infestans in cool, wet conditions
Potato___Late_blight.prevention: Fungicides (mancozeb + metalaxyl), resistant varieties, destroy volunteers, proper spacing, high potassium soil, avoid overhead watering

Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.cause: Fungus Mycosphaerella fragariae in cool wet weather
Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.prevention: Fungicides (captan), remove infected leaves, improve air circulation, potassium soil amendments

Tomato___Bacterial_spot.cause: Bacteria Xanthomonas spp. spread by rain splash
Tomato___Bacterial_spot.prevention: Copper bactericides, crop rotation, remove infected debris, disease-free seeds, fixed copper + potassium foliar spray

Tomato___Early_blight.cause: Fungus Alternaria solani on lower leaves during wet periods
Tomato___Early_blight.prevention: Fungicides (chlorothalonil), mulch, stake plants, crop rotation, potassium-rich soil, remove lower leaves

Tomato___Late_blight.cause: Phytophthora infestans in cool, moist conditions
Tomato___Late_blight.prevention: Protective fungicides (chlorothalonil), resistant varieties, proper spacing, destroy debris, high potassium NPK
